---
title: "Sobre mi"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://x.com/bastimapache
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/bastianolea
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/bastianolea

---

About this blog
